state.c(3) Library Functions Manual state.c(3)

NAME

state.c - Ring consensus state machine implementation.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct election_result_t
Election result storage. struct consensus_state
State machine instance.

Typedefs


typedef struct consensus_state consensus_state_t
State machine instance.

Functions


asciichat_error_t consensus_state_create (const uint8_t my_id[16], const consensus_topology_t *topology, consensus_state_t **out_state)
Initialize state machine with topology. void consensus_state_destroy (consensus_state_t *state)
Destroy state machine and free resources. asciichat_error_t consensus_state_start_collection (consensus_state_t *state)
Transition to COLLECTION_START state. asciichat_error_t consensus_state_add_metrics (consensus_state_t *state, const participant_metrics_t *metrics)
Add collected metrics from a participant. asciichat_error_t consensus_state_collection_complete (consensus_state_t *state)
Transition to COLLECTION_COMPLETE state. asciichat_error_t consensus_state_compute_election (consensus_state_t *state)
Run election algorithm and transition to ELECTION_COMPLETE. asciichat_error_t consensus_state_reset_to_idle (consensus_state_t *state)
Transition back to IDLE from ELECTION_COMPLETE. consensus_state_machine_t consensus_state_get_current_state (const consensus_state_t *state)
Get current state machine state. asciichat_error_t consensus_state_get_elected_host (const consensus_state_t *state, uint8_t out_host_id[16])
Get elected host ID from last election. asciichat_error_t consensus_state_get_elected_backup (const consensus_state_t *state, uint8_t out_backup_id[16])
Get elected backup host ID from last election. bool consensus_state_is_leader (const consensus_state_t *state)
Check if we are the elected leader for this round. int consensus_state_get_metrics_count (const consensus_state_t *state)
Get count of metrics collected in current round. asciichat_error_t consensus_state_get_metric_at (const consensus_state_t *state, int index, participant_metrics_t *out_metrics)
Get collected metrics at index.

Detailed Description

Ring consensus state machine implementation.

Definition in file state.c.

Typedef Documentation

typedef struct consensus_state consensus_state_t

State machine instance. Opaque consensus state machine handle.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t consensus_state_add_metrics (consensus_state_t * state, const participant_metrics_t * metrics)

Add collected metrics from a participant. Valid in: COLLECTING state Stores metrics in dynamic array (grows as needed, initial capacity 10)

Parameters

state State machine handle
metrics Participant metrics to store

Returns

ASCIICHAT_OK on success, ERROR_INVALID_STATE if not in COLLECTING state

Definition at line 100 of file state.c.

100                                                                                                               {
101   if (!state || !metrics) {
102     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters");
103   }
104 
105   if (state->current_state != CONSENSUS_STATE_COLLECTING) {
106     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_STATE, "Invalid state for adding metrics: %d", state->current_state);
107   }
108 
109   /* Grow array if needed */
110   if (state->metrics_count >= state->metrics_capacity) {
111     int new_capacity = state->metrics_capacity * 2;
112     participant_metrics_t *new_metrics =
113         SAFE_REALLOC(state->metrics, new_capacity * sizeof(participant_metrics_t), participant_metrics_t *);
114     state->metrics = new_metrics;
115     state->metrics_capacity = new_capacity;
116   }
117 
118   /* Copy metrics into array */
119   memcpy(&state->metrics[state->metrics_count], metrics, sizeof(participant_metrics_t));
120   state->metrics_count++;
121 
122   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
123 }




References ASCIICHAT_OK, CONSENSUS_STATE_COLLECTING,
    consensus_state::current_state, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_INVALID_STATE, consensus_state::metrics,
    consensus_state::metrics_capacity,
    consensus_state::metrics_count, SAFE_REALLOC, and
    SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by consensus_coordinator_on_stats_update().






asciichat_error_t consensus_state_collection_complete
  (consensus_state_t * state)


Transition to COLLECTION_COMPLETE state. Valid from: COLLECTING
    Transitions to: ELECTION_START (if leader) or IDLE (if not leader)




Parameters


state State machine handle


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, ERROR_INVALID_STATE if
  transition invalid


Definition at line 125 of file state.c.


125                                                                                 {
126   if (!state) {
127     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "State is NULL");
128   }
129 
130   if (state->current_state != CONSENSUS_STATE_COLLECTING) {
131     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_STATE, "Invalid transition from state %d", state->current_state);
132   }
133 
134   /* Transition: if we're leader, go to ELECTION_START; otherwise go to IDLE */
135   if (consensus_topology_am_leader(state->topology)) {
136     state->current_state = CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_START;
137   } else {
138     state->current_state = CONSENSUS_STATE_IDLE;
139   }
140 
141   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
142 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, CONSENSUS_STATE_COLLECTING,
    CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_START, CONSENSUS_STATE_IDLE,
    consensus_topology_am_leader(),
    consensus_state::current_state, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_INVALID_STATE, SET_ERRNO, and
    consensus_state::topology.






asciichat_error_t consensus_state_compute_election
  (consensus_state_t * state)


Run election algorithm and transition to ELECTION_COMPLETE. Valid
    from: ELECTION_START or ELECTION_COMPLETE Processes collected metrics to
    select best host and backup. Election selects host as participant with best
    score, backup as second-best. Score is computed from metrics: lower RTT +
    higher bandwidth = better score. Only leader should call this.




Parameters


state State machine handle


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, ERROR_INVALID_STATE if not in
  ELECTION_START state


Definition at line 144 of file state.c.


144                                                                              {
145   if (!state) {
146     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "State is NULL");
147   }
148 
149   if (state->current_state != CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_START) {
150     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_STATE, "Invalid transition from state %d", state->current_state);
151   }
152 
153   if (state->metrics_count < 2) {
154     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Need at least 2 metrics for election, have %d", state->metrics_count);
155   }
156 
157   /* Find best and second-best metrics */
158   int best_idx = 0;
159   int backup_idx = 1;
160 
161   double best_score = compute_metric_score(&state->metrics[0]);
162   double backup_score = compute_metric_score(&state->metrics[1]);
163 
164   /* Ensure best_idx has lower score */
165   if (best_score > backup_score) {
166     int tmp = best_idx;
167     best_idx = backup_idx;
168     backup_idx = tmp;
169     double tmp_score = best_score;
170     best_score = backup_score;
171     backup_score = tmp_score;
172   }
173 
174   /* Find best and second-best */
175   for (int i = 2; i < state->metrics_count; i++) {
176     double score = compute_metric_score(&state->metrics[i]);
177     if (score < best_score) {
178       backup_idx = best_idx;
179       backup_score = best_score;
180       best_idx = i;
181       best_score = score;
182     } else if (score < backup_score) {
183       backup_idx = i;
184       backup_score = score;
185     }
186   }
187 
188   /* Store election result */
189   memcpy(state->election_result.host_id, state->metrics[best_idx].participant_id, 16);
190   memcpy(state->election_result.backup_id, state->metrics[backup_idx].participant_id, 16);
191   state->election_result.timestamp_ns = time_get_realtime_ns();
192 
193   state->current_state = CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_COMPLETE;
194   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
195 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    election_result_t::backup_id,
    CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_COMPLETE,
    CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_START,
    consensus_state::current_state,
    consensus_state::election_result, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_INVALID_STATE, election_result_t::host_id,
    consensus_state::metrics, consensus_state::metrics_count,
    SET_ERRNO, time_get_realtime_ns(), and
    election_result_t::timestamp_ns.






asciichat_error_t consensus_state_create (const
  uint8_t my_id[16], const consensus_topology_t * topology,
  consensus_state_t ** out_state)


Initialize state machine with topology. Creates a new state
    machine for managing consensus rounds. Initial state is
    CONSENSUS_STATE_IDLE.




Parameters


my_id My 16-byte UUID


topology Topology handle (not owned by state machine)


out_state Output state machine handle (caller must destroy)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 50 of file state.c.


51                                                                         {
52   if (!my_id || !topology || !out_state) {
53     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid state creation parameters");
54   }
55 
56   consensus_state_t *state = SAFE_MALLOC(sizeof(*state), consensus_state_t *);
57   memset(state, 0, sizeof(*state));
58 
59   state->current_state = CONSENSUS_STATE_IDLE;
60   state->topology = (consensus_topology_t *)topology; /* Cast away const for storage */
61   memcpy(state->my_id, my_id, 16);
62 
63   /* Initialize metrics array with initial capacity of 10 */
64   state->metrics_capacity = 10;
65   state->metrics_count = 0;
66   state->metrics = SAFE_MALLOC(state->metrics_capacity * sizeof(participant_metrics_t), participant_metrics_t *);
67 
68   memset(&state->election_result, 0, sizeof(election_result_t));
69 
70   *out_state = state;
71   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
72 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, CONSENSUS_STATE_IDLE,
    consensus_state::current_state,
    consensus_state::election_result, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    consensus_state::metrics, consensus_state::metrics_capacity,
    consensus_state::metrics_count, consensus_state::my_id,
    SAFE_MALLOC, SET_ERRNO, and
  consensus_state::topology.


Referenced by consensus_coordinator_create(), and
    consensus_coordinator_on_ring_members().

consensus_state_machine_t
  consensus_state_get_current_state (const consensus_state_t *
  state)


Get current state machine state.


Parameters


state State machine handle


Returns


Current state (FAILED if state is NULL)


Definition at line 210 of file state.c.

212     return CONSENSUS_STATE_FAILED;

asciichat_error_t consensus_state_get_elected_backup
  (const consensus_state_t * state, uint8_t
  out_backup_id[16])


Get elected backup host ID from last election. Valid from:
    ELECTION_COMPLETE state




Parameters


state State machine handle


out_backup_id Output 16-byte backup UUID (caller provides buffer)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, ERROR_INVALID_STATE if election
  not complete


Definition at line 230 of file state.c.


230                                                                                                                 {
231   if (!state || !out_backup_id) {
232     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters");
233   }
234 
235   if (state->current_state != CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_COMPLETE) {
236     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_STATE, "Election not complete, current state: %d", state->current_state);
237   }
238 
239   memcpy(out_backup_id, state->election_result.backup_id, 16);
240   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
241 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    election_result_t::backup_id,
    CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_COMPLETE,
    consensus_state::current_state,

    ERROR_INVALID_STATE, and SET_ERRNO.

asciichat_error_t consensus_state_get_metric_at (const
  consensus_state_t * state, int index, participant_metrics_t *
  out_metrics)


Get collected metrics at index. Valid from: COLLECTING,
    COLLECTION_COMPLETE, or ELECTION states




Parameters


state State machine handle


index Index of metric to retrieve (0-based)


out_metrics Output metrics structure


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 257 of file state.c.


258                                                                                     {
259   if (!state || !out_metrics || index < 0) {
260     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters");
261   }
262 
263   if (index >= state->metrics_count) {
264     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Index %d out of bounds (count: %d)", index, state->metrics_count);
265   }
266 
267   /* Valid to retrieve metrics in COLLECTING, COLLECTION_COMPLETE, or ELECTION states */
268   if (state->current_state != CONSENSUS_STATE_COLLECTING &&
269       state->current_state != CONSENSUS_STATE_COLLECTION_COMPLETE &&
270       state->current_state != CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_START && state->current_state != CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTING &&
271       state->current_state != CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_COMPLETE) {
272     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_STATE, "Cannot retrieve metrics in state %d", state->current_state);
273   }
274 
275   memcpy(out_metrics, &state->metrics[index], sizeof(participant_metrics_t));
276   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
277 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, CONSENSUS_STATE_COLLECTING,
    CONSENSUS_STATE_COLLECTION_COMPLETE, CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTING,
    CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_COMPLETE,
    CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_START,
    consensus_state::current_state, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_INVALID_STATE, consensus_state::metrics,
    consensus_state::metrics_count, and SET_ERRNO.

Returns


true if we are the ring leader, false otherwise

asciichat_error_t consensus_state_reset_to_idle
  (consensus_state_t * state)


Transition back to IDLE from ELECTION_COMPLETE. Valid from:
    ELECTION_COMPLETE Transitions to: IDLE




Parameters


state State machine handle


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, ERROR_INVALID_STATE if
  transition invalid


Definition at line 197 of file state.c.


197                                                                           {
198   if (!state) {
199     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "State is NULL");
200   }
201 
202   if (state->current_state != CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_COMPLETE) {
203     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_STATE, "Invalid transition from state %d", state->current_state);
204   }
205 
206   state->current_state = CONSENSUS_STATE_IDLE;
207   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
208 }

asciichat_error_t consensus_state_start_collection
  (consensus_state_t * state)


Transition to COLLECTION_START state. Valid from: IDLE Transitions
    to: COLLECTING




Parameters


state State machine handle


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, ERROR_INVALID_STATE if
  transition invalid


Definition at line 83 of file state.c.


83                                                                              {
84   if (!state) {
85     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "State is NULL");
86   }
87 
88   if (state->current_state != CONSENSUS_STATE_IDLE) {
89     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_STATE, "Invalid transition from state %d", state->current_state);
90   }
91 
92   /* Reset metrics from previous round */
93   state->metrics_count = 0;
94   memset(&state->election_result, 0, sizeof(election_result_t));
95 
96   state->current_state = CONSENSUS_STATE_COLLECTING;
97   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
98 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, CONSENSUS_STATE_COLLECTING,
    CONSENSUS_STATE_IDLE, consensus_state::current_state,
    consensus_state::election_result, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_INVALID_STATE, consensus_state::metrics_count, and
    SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by
  consensus_coordinator_on_collection_start().
